title: sassia debilis
intro: Sassia debilis, also known as sea squirt, is a type of marine tunicate that belongs to the phylum Chordata. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sassia debilis are thought to include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and potential anti-cancer properties. It can be prepared as a herbal supplement, often in the form of a capsule or extract, or used in traditional medicine practices such as decoctions or infusions.
